notable_phrases: biggest quarter ever, which set new all-time records in both revenue and earnings
wider than usual revenue range for the second quarter due to the greater uncertainty
We've attempted to account for this delayed startup through our larger range of outcomes
summary: Apple reported record quarterly results driven by strong iPhone and wearables growth, but provided wider-than-usual guidance due to coronavirus-related supply chain and demand uncertainties in China.
change_summary: vs 2019 Q4: Analyst pushback level decreased by 23.00.
